description_long: This community center is a large, modern, single-story building with a flat roof and a sprawling, rectangular footprint. The structure is surrounded by landscaped grounds featuring rows of trees and a prominent outdoor swimming pool bordered by purple-flowering trees. The main building appears to have multiple wings and open courtyards, with paved walkways and driveways leading up to the entrances. The exterior is predominantly white, with large windows and open spaces suggesting communal gathering areas. The grounds are meticulously organized, with symmetrical tree plantings and a spacious parking or drop-off area at the front. The overall design emphasizes accessibility, openness, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story community center with a flat roof, white exterior, landscaped grounds, and a large outdoor pool. The building features multiple wings, open courtyards, and symmetrical tree-lined walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveways, and symmetrical tree-lined approach.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the building's layout, pool area, and extensive landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool, purple-flowering trees, and back courtyard.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the long driveway, parking area, and side landscaping.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is wide and centrally located, accessible via a paved walkway flanked by trees. The entrance appears to be integrated into the building's facade with large glass panels and possibly automatic doors, but no steps or ramps are distinctly visible. The design is open and welcoming, matching the modern architectural style.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary style with clean lines, flat roof, large windows, and a focus on open, communal spaces and integration with landscaped surroundings.
